sections.paragraph:
Original: עשׂו

Transliteration: ‛êśâv

Phonetic: ay-sawv'

BDB Definition:

Esau = "hairy"
  1. eldest son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Jacob; sold the birthright for food when he was hungry and the divine blessing went to Jacob; progenitor of the Arab peoples

Origin: apparently a form of the pass. part. of H6213 in the original sense of handling

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
